sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 86:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 86:1
items.html: Six of direct light, from Hesed to Yesod, and four of reflected light, from Netzah to Malchut. The reflected light of Netzah is in the vessel of Netzah, etc.
